name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement, especially one that strengthens rigor or reproducibility

## Problem

What is missing or hard today, and who it affects.

## Proposal

What you would like to happen. For evaluation changes, note how it keeps the integrity rails intact
(floors, shuffled-label control, probe-collapse diagnostic, no reported number from a
non-reproducible path).

## Alternatives

Other approaches you considered.
